message:
fix(ft-api): polygamma + multigammaln autograd via apply_function [bd-1tax]

Two more children of frankentorch-1tax converted from fail-loud
guards to autograd-aware composition via tensor_apply_function,
matching the gammaln / digamma pattern (7cc0b45 / 86fb29d).

tensor_polygamma(n, x):
    forward : y = polygamma(n, x)
    backward: dy/dx = polygamma(n + 1, x)
The next-order derivative identity holds for any n >= 0; the n == 0
case still short-circuits to tensor_digamma so its trigamma backward
keeps the existing wiring.

tensor_multigammaln(x, p):
    forward : y = ((p*(p-1))/4) * log(pi) + sum_{i=0..p-1} lgamma(x - i/2)
    backward: dy/dx = sum_{i=0..p-1} digamma(x - i/2)
The constant term drops out of the derivative; each lgamma(x - i/2)
contributes a digamma(x - i/2) shift via the chain rule.

Tests:
  polygamma_propagates_gradient_via_next_order: pinpoints
    d/dx trigamma(2) = polygamma(2, 2) = -2*(zeta(3) - 1) within
    5e-3 (polygamma_approx envelope).
  multigammaln_propagates_gradient_via_digamma_sum: cross-checks
    the analytical sum-of-digamma backward against a finite-
    difference reference using the public forward path; tolerates
    1e-4 absolute (lgamma-libm + digamma_approx accumulated).

All existing forward tests (polygamma_n1_trigamma,
multigammaln_p1_matches_gammaln) continue to pass — bit-for-bit
forward parity preserved.

Files closure for the polygamma + multigammaln slices of
frankentorch-1tax. Remaining children: erfinv (next), logcumsumexp.

Workspace: 1132 ft-api tests green (1130 + 2 new), clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
